name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry's new exquisite quilted academic-style Lauren bag🤪🤪 decorated with Thomas Burberry exclusive logo, paired with a shiny chain strap. Crossbody or top handle for a handbag look. 26 x 10 x 18cm, 8396
